{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the central claim (Lyapunov stability guarantees) but does not propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Does not engage the argument chain, only identifies one consistency issue with no proposed fix.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (Lyapunov stability guarantees), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (hold-previous-setpoint fallback can itself be unsafe).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not."
  },

  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the central claim (Lyapunov stability guarantees) but does not propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Does not engage the argument chain, only identifies one consistency issue with no proposed fix.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (Lyapunov stability guarantees), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (hold-previous-setpoint fallback can itself be unsafe).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not.
